description:
Eiyu, Shio, and Akari find out their childhood friend Haru is a girl.
Source: Crunchyroll

titles.title: An Unfamiliar Girl Who`s Your "Guy Friend"? But If You Laugh, It Still Won`t Start a Rom-Com
Mishiranu Joshi de mo "Otoko Tomodachi" Dakara de mo Waracchattara Lovecome ni Naranai
見知らぬ女子でも"男友達"だからでも笑っちゃったらラブコメにならない
